foundation.summary: Core Dagster concepts and getting started guide
foundation.prompt: I'm new to Dagster and want to understand the fundamental concepts and how to get started building data pipelines.

build-pipeline.summary: Complete guide to building Dagster pipelines with assets
build-pipeline.prompt: Help me build a data pipeline in Dagster with assets, dependencies, and proper data handling.

automation.summary: Scheduling and automation features in Dagster
automation.prompt: I want to automate my Dagster pipelines with schedules, sensors, or declarative automation.

advanced-patterns.prompt: I need to implement advanced Dagster patterns like dynamic graphs, asset factories, testing, or debugging.

deployment.summary: Deploying and operating Dagster in production
deployment.prompt: Help me deploy Dagster to production and structure my project properly.

tutorial-complete.summary: End-to-end ETL tutorial with all concepts
tutorial-complete.prompt: Guide me through building a complete ETL pipeline in Dagster from start to finish with best practices.
